locations.name: 肯尼亚
locations.summary: 肯亞共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Kenya；英語：Republic of Kenya），通稱肯亞（Kenya），是位於東非，濒临印度洋，與索馬里、埃塞俄比亚、南蘇丹、烏干達、坦桑尼亚接壤，面积约58万平方公里。肯亞人口约52…

locations.name: 南蘇丹
locations.summary: 南蘇丹共和國（英語：Republic of South Sudan），通稱南蘇丹（英語：South Sudan），是非洲東北部一個內陸國家，2011年從蘇丹獨立。東面是埃塞俄比亞，南面是剛果民主共和國、肯亞和烏干達，西面是中非共和國，北面…

relations.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Spermestes griseicapilla |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719778A263766881 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719778A263766881.en |access-date=22 February 2025}} | genus = Spermestes | species = griseicapilla | authority = (Delacour, 1943) | synonyms = Odontospiza griseicapillaLonchura griseicapilla }} The grey-headed silverbill (Spermestes griseicapilla), also known as pearl-headed mannikin, is a species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa, Ethiopia, Kenya, South Sudan, and Tanzania

relations.evidence: The grey-headed silverbill is commonly found in dry savanna habitat but never too far away from water
